headline: Lodging Sector Set For Second-Quarter Beats Amid US RevPAR Acceleration, Morgan Stanley Says
summary: Most lodging companies are poised to report second-quarter results above Wall Street's projections,

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Hilton Worldwide Holdings, Raises Price Target to $332
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Stephen Grambling   maintains Hilton Worldwide Holdings (NYSE:HLT) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $319 to $332.
